backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Bhagavad Gita Saar backend, defining all data types (User, Wallet, Recharge, Withdrawal, UTR, Commission, etc.) and including authorization and blob-storage mixins; stores admin credentials as `adminUsername = "ADMIN"` and `adminPassword = "Mahendra7959"`.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that admin credentials (username 'ADMIN', password 'Mahendra7959') are stored in the Motoko backend and that the frontend Login page authenticates against the backend actor using those credentials.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing each page, hook, component, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, chart, and destructive color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, setting the page title to 'Bhagavad Gita Saar' and mounting the app via `/src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining all application routes (home, /go redirect, register, login, dashboard, book, contact, privacy, admin) and wrapping them in a Layout with a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Responsive site layout component with a sticky maroon header, desktop and mobile navigation links, and conditional login/logout controls based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/ShareableLink.ts: Reusable component that displays the site's short `/go` URL with a copy-to-clipboard button and a success toast, styled with saffron/maroon spiritual theme.
frontend/src/data/gitaContent.ts: Static TypeScript data file exporting all 18 Bhagavad Gita chapters, each with a title, subtitle, and array of Hindi summary points (100 points total).
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Custom hook that manages local authentication state (user, phone, loading) by reading from session/local storage and exposes logout and refresh helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider component, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state to the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for admin operations (checking admin status, managing UTRs, users, withdrawals, recharges, and contacts) against both the backend actor and local storage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for a spiritual saffron/gold theme in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/auth.ts: Handles session management via sessionStorage and provides local-storage-backed CRUD operations for users, UTRs, contacts, withdrawals, and recharges, including registration, login, and referral logic.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays and manages UTRs, users, recharges, withdrawals, and contacts via local storage helpers and backend React Query hooks, with access restricted to admin sessions.
frontend/src/pages/BookContent.tsx: Displays the Bhagavad Gita book content with 18 collapsible chapters, gating access behind authentication and account activation checks. Unauthenticated or inactive users see lock screens with navigation prompts.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Renders a contact page with a support email display and a validated contact form that submits name, email, and message via the auth library. Shows a success state after submission.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: User dashboard with tabbed sections for wallet balance, UTR payment submission, withdrawal requests, and mobile recharge, all tied to the local auth/user state. Redirects unauthenticated users to login.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero banner, feature highlights, and conditional CTAs based on authentication state (register/login vs. dashboard/book links). Includes a shareable referral link component.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login form supporting both regular phone/password login and a special admin login flow that verifies credentials against the backend actor. Redirects to dashboard or admin panel on success.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicy.tsx: Renders a Hindi-language Privacy Policy page covering data privacy, cookies, payment information, and user rights sections with a styled card layout.
frontend/src/pages/Register.tsx: Registration page with phone, password, and referral code fields, including validation, pre-filling referral code from URL query params, and redirect to login on success.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and hash cleanup.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom spiritual colors (saffron, gold, maroon, cream), Devanagari/Poppins fonts, and animation/plugin setup.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing a Bhagavad Gita Saar MLM platform with UPI payments, 10-level referral commissions, wallet/recharge/withdrawal features, and admin panel built on Node.js/Express/MongoDB.
